name: Plantation Coffee Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Vanilla or coffee ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, instant coffee, salt, and vanilla in a large pitcher.
2. Stir until the sugar dissolves completely.
3. Add milk and stir again.
4. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
5. When serving, ladle the ice cream into individual punch cups.
6. Pour the coffee mixture over the ice cream.
7. Top with puffs of whipped cream and sprinkle with a little nutmeg.
8. Serve immediately in punch cups.
Makes 12 servings.
